title: abutilon tubulosum var. breviflorum
intro: Abutilon tubulosum var. breviflorum, also known as a variety of the flowering mapou tree, is a plant species in the mallow family (Malvaceae). The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, skin irritations, and inflammatory conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Abutilon tubulosum var. breviflorum include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and soothe skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
